turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: This is the third time your garbage product has broken. You people are completely useless.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: I'm sorry for the frustration. Let me see what I can do to make this right.

turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: Don't give me that scripted nonsense. You're an idiot if you think 'sorry' fixes anything. I want a refund NOW.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: I understand. I can process that refund for you immediately.

turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: About time. Worst company I've ever dealt with, and that's saying something.
